query:
-- Check UCXcel Webex Basic services revenue vs billing items
SELECT 
  s.externalId, 
  s.planName, 
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.customerName,
  bi.lineAmount as billingItemAmount,
  bi.quantity as billingItemQty,
  bi.unitAmount as billingItemUnitAmount,
  bi.description as billingItemDesc
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
WHERE s.planName = 'UCXcel Webex Basic'
  AND s.status != 'terminated'
  AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
ORDER BY s.monthlyRevenue DESC
LIMIT 8;
